snippets.snippet: Staff and boss of owner very kind.
Buat harga semurah itu okey banget
Seriusan ga expect kalau hotel nya nyaman banget.
Super duper kind and helpful staff
Kamar bersih, ac dingin , ada air panas😭

address.address2: Jl. Bypass, Cot Abeuk, Kec. Sukajaya, Kota Sabang, Aceh 24411

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter
Temperature check for guests and staff

reviewSnippets: Buat kemana mana menurut saja ga jauh.. pokoknya seneng.
Seriusan ga expect kalau hotel nya nyaman banget.
Kamar bersih, ac dingin , ada air panas😭
Super duper kind and helpful staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room facilities are complete, with air conditioning, beds that can be twin, and a bathroom complete with a heater. The price is very wallet-friendly.
comments.reviewTitle: A place close to all access, ports, cities, etc.
comments.originalTitle: Tempat dekat segala akses, pelabuhan,kota dll.
comments.originalComment:
Fasilitas kamar lengkap, ac, bed bisa twin, dan kamar mandi lengkap dengan pemanas.
Harganya sangat bersahabat di dompet

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: First, we came to Sabang to this hotel but it turned out that the rooms were fully booked. So I suggest that the hotel management be more selective to avoid overlaps like this, and in the end, we were moved to Seulanga Hotel at SMKN 1. Thankfully, we got a comfortable room with a very soft bed, and not only that, we also made new acquaintances. So I recommend not Sabang Hotel but this partner hotel instead.
comments.originalComment: pertama dtg ke sabang menuju hotel ini tp ternyata kamarnya sdh habis .jd saya sarankan agar pihak hotel harley lbh selektif lg ahar tdk terjadi tumpang tindih seperti ini jd akhirnya kami dipindahkan ke hotel seulanga di SMKN 1 , dan alhamdulillah kami dpt kamar yg nyaman dgn tmp tdr yg sangat empuk dan bkn hanya itu kami jg dpt kenalan baru , jd yg saya rekom bkn hotel sabangnya tp hotel rekanannya ini.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Buon rapporto qualità prezzo. Lontano dal centro se non hai lo scooter. Però per appoggio buono. Acqua calda e aria condizionata.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
+ The room is very spacious, the room is clean and tidy, the bathroom is also spacious and clean, the additional facilities are complete and the price is very affordable.  
- The room is on the second floor and there is no elevator.
comments.originalComment:
+ Kamar luas banget, Kmar bersih dn rapi, kamar mandi jg luas dn bersih, fasilitas luamayn lengkap dan harga sngat2 terjangkau
- Kamar di lantai 2 dan gada lift

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Kami dipindahkan ke hotel lain yg lebih jauh dan buruk

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Close access to the port and Sabang city, the place is clean, the rooms are spacious, complete facilities, the staff and owner are friendly and welcoming, the best.....
comments.originalComment: Dekat  akses ke pelabuhan dan kota sabang, tempat nya bersih kamar luas, fasilitas lengkap, staf dan owner nya bersahabat dan ramah, terbaik.....

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is clean, quiet, comfortable, has sports facilities, and offers free pick-up and drop-off at the port...
comments.originalComment: Tempat nya bersih, tenang, nyaman, ada sarana olahraga, frèe antar jemput pelabuhan....

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: All the hotel facilities and rooms are really nice and clean, the air conditioning is very cold, but I'm a bit anxious about parking outside on the roadside. But thank God, it was all safe yesterday. I recommend this place for anyone looking for a hotel near the port, definitely worth stopping by. 👍
comments.originalComment: Semua fasilitas dan kamar hotel bagus banget bersih AC dingin banget cuma agak cemas aja parkir di luar di tepi jalan pula tp Alhamdulillah kemarin aman" aja rekomendasi buat nyari hotel di dekat pelabuhan boleh ni mampir 👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Staff and boss of owner very kind. Can ask anything if you got problem.thanks owner send us back to harbour.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Many dispensations, sometimes booking a room for 2 people but allowed for 3 and 4 people because of family, and free transportation to the port is provided.
comments.originalComment: Banyak dispensasi, kadang booking kamar unt 2 orang tapi diizinkan unt 3 dan 4 orang karena keluarga, dan dibantu antar free ke pelabuhan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Seriusan ga expect kalau hotel nya nyaman banget. Maaf baru review.. ga expect dengan harga yg affordable kamar mandi nya dapat yg nyediain air panas. So happy. Empuk juga kasur nya.. next ke sabang bakal nginap di sini lagi. Buat kemana mana menurut saja ga jauh.. pokoknya seneng. Terima kasih..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall it's okay with that price.. the staff is friendly.. the owner is also friendly.. the room is clean.. the downside is the bed has a hole in it.
comments.originalComment:
overall okelah dgn harga segitu..stafnya ramah..pemilik jg ramah..kamar bersih..
minus bed nya udah ada yg jeblos..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The aircon was not perfect but it works, the mattresses were very spongy, so not great for my back. Overall though great value for money, comfy, quiet, functional, and friendly staff. Room has a mini locker for valuables. The hotel has very easy access to airport and ferry port, if you have a scooter or take a taxi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sebenarnya nyaman tempat yg dikasih, cuma kita baru nyampe laper, capek, pas harus pindah lokasi karena mreka punya tamu, dan ditawari opsi uang kembali rasanya wuahhh, dah capek mesti cari hotel baru, pdhl mgkn bs dg bhsa yg lbh baik jd pengunjung gak kesal

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Oke semuanya....bahkan ada lapangan indoor badminton. Namun posisinya yang jauh dengan kota sabang apalagi wisata di sabang. Lebih deket ke palebuhan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is nice, complete with air conditioning and hot water. Unfortunately, the air conditioning in one of the rooms is not cool, and I have reported it to the staff but haven't received much response.
comments.originalComment: Kamar nya bagus, lengkap AC plus air panas. Sayang salah satu kamar AC nya tidak dingin, sudah lapor staff kurang respon

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The price is fine, but unfortunately almost all the rooms we booked, there are 3 rooms on the second floor, all of them are not cool.
comments.reviewTitle: The price is okay, but the air conditioning is not cold.
comments.originalTitle: Harga Ok tapi AC tidak dingin
comments.originalComment: Untuk harga udah ok, tapi sayang hampir semua kamar yang kami pesan ada 3 kamar di lantai 2, semuanya tidak dingin

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The TV doesn't work.  
There is no sink.  
The air conditioning is not cold enough.  
The sheets and pillowcases have not been changed because they still smell like sweat.  
Drinking water must be taken from the dispenser.
comments.originalComment:
TV tdk bisa hidup
Gak ada wastafel
AC kurang dingin
Sprei dan sarung bantal gak diganti Krn msh terbau keringat orang
Air minum harus ambil di dispenser

comments.reviewComments: Please choose another one

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The bathroom is dirty and has not been cleaned.
comments.originalComment: Kamar mandi nya jorok tidak dibersihkan

comments.originalComment: Dekat dari pelabuhan, tidak begitu jauh dari kota

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Suitable for bikers and backpackers.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: the resolution that is very satisfying
comments.originalComment: pelanyanannya yang sangat memuaskan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 5 days 4 nights there felt comfortable... in between the harbor and the city...
comments.originalComment: 5 hari 4 malam disana berasa nyaman... ditengah2 antara pelabuhan dgn kotanya...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is good. I will come back again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The economical price already includes accommodation with air conditioning and an en-suite bathroom...
comments.originalComment: Harga ekonomis sudah dapat penginapan yg ber AC dan kamar mandi dalam...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I am very impressed with their hotel service, good.
comments.originalComment: Sangat salut dg layanan hotel nya, good

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Affordable price. Quite cheap, but not cheap quality.
comments.originalComment: Harga terjangkau. Cukup murah, tapi tidak murahan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Located in the middle, the distance to Jaboi, to Sumurtiga, and to Anoi Itam is close because the hotel is centrally positioned and easy to find. The price is okay with expectations, but unfortunately, there are no blankets and towels. Usually, hotels always provide those two components.
comments.originalComment:
Pas di tengah, jarak ke Jaboi, ke sumurtiga ke anoi itam berdekatan karena posisi hotel di tengah dan mudah di temukan.
Untuk harga sudah ok dengan ekspektasi, cuma syg ga da selimut dan handuk. 
Biasanya hotel slalu menyertakan 2 komponen trsbt.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We are going to Sabang in the peak season when we need to queue for the ferry to pass the sea. Our car need to queue for the chance to get into the ferry since 1 day before our turn. So, we do not have any vehicle to go to the harbour. Kindly the owner offer us the free ride to the harbour and even lend the motion to my husband so he can arrange our car in harbour. Super duper recommended..
comments.reviewTitle: Super duper kind and helpful staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good, comfortable, and safe.
comments.originalComment: Bagus , nyaman dan aman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Ketika saya mau book kamar, ternyata sudah penuh..tapi owner, bang fauzi mempersilahkan sy untuk bersih2 badan dlu dan menyediakan tmpt istirahat sementara di dlm hotel nya, smbl menunggu kalau ada yg cancell booking. thanks bang atas kebaikannya..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Highly recommended, affordable price, spacious room.. clean, friendly staff.. great..
comments.originalComment: Sangat recomended, harga murah, kamar luas..bersih, staff ramah..mantap..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I stayed for 2 nights, cheap price, clean, cold air conditioning, friendly staff, not too far from Balohan port, recommended.. great...
comments.originalComment: Saya nginap 2 malam, harga murah, bersih, ac dingin, staff ramah, tidak begitu jauh dari pelabuhan balohan, recommended..mantap...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room leaks when it rains, the suitcase and bag got wet. Maybe the owner doesn't know the room is leaking, it's about 10 minutes to the city, and it has hot water. 👍
comments.originalComment:
Kamarnya bocor pas hujan, koper dan tas basah
Mungkin owner nya gatau kamarnya bocor, ke kota sekitar 10 menit, ada air panasnya 👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Kamar bersih, ac dingin , ada air panas😭

comments.reviewTitle: MANTAPP BAKALAN NGINEP LAGI DISINI SIH

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Bed full of sands, so many mosquitos, the room smell like its never change linen/sheets for weeks! In the middle of hotel there is a badminton court full of player. So loud. Its not worth the stay! Traveloka should romove this hotel from website because this accomodation not meet any standart!
